# LoansForPlumbers

> LoansForPlumbers (loansforplumbers.com) — Matches plumbing and trade business owners with licensed specialists who qualify them on 12–24 months of deposits or 1099s for purchases, cash-out refinancing, and the Tradesman HELOC — write-offs untouched. LoansForPlumbers is an AdaptLend service (adaptlend.com) and is not a lender.

## Key facts

- Trade business owners qualify on 12–24 months of deposits (cash counts once deposited) or gross 1099s — truck/equipment write-offs never enter the math.
- The Tradesman HELOC funds trucks, crews, and buildouts at home-equity pricing while keeping business credit free.
- Cash-out refinancing is available without tax returns.
- 12 months self-employed with prior W-2 trade history can be enough.
- Filling out the form does not affect credit; a credit check only happens if the borrower moves forward with a specialist.

## How it works

1. Answer a few plain-English questions (about two minutes, no credit check).
2. LoansForPlumbers matches the borrower with a licensed specialist for this exact situation.
3. The specialist contacts the borrower within one business day; the match also arrives by email.
